Prayer.title: Prayer
Prayer.description: A prayer request submitted by a user.

text.description: The content of the prayer request.

author.description: The name of the person submitting the prayer.

email.description: The email of the person submitting the prayer.

phone.description: The phone number of the person submitting the prayer.

prayedCount.description: The number of times people have prayed for this request.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the prayer was submitted.

Repentance.title: Repentance
Repentance.description: A repentance confession submitted by a user.

author.description: The name of the person submitting the repentance.

email.description: The email of the person submitting the repentance.

phone.description: The phone number of the person submitting the repentance.

graceCount.description: The number of times people have sent grace for this repentance.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the repentance was submitted.

Creation.title: Creation
Creation.description: A creation (testimony, poem, song, or prophetic revelation) submitted by a user.

audioUrl.description: The URL of the uploaded audio file.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the uploaded image file.

videoUrl.description: The URL of the uploaded video file.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the creation was submitted.

JourneyMedia.title: JourneyMedia
JourneyMedia.description: Media (image or video) uploaded for the Journey of Grace page.

url.description: The URL of the uploaded media file.

year.description: The year the media was taken.

isTimeline.description: Flag indicating if the media belongs to the curated timeline.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the media was uploaded.

author.description: The name of the person uploading the media.

/creations/{creationId}.description: Collection of creations (testimonies, poems, songs, prophetic revelations).

/journeyMedia/{mediaId}.description: Collection of media for the Journey of Grace.
